plugins.name: wzrdx-kb
plugins.notes: KB-first doctrine. The unified MCP server (Graphify + LanceDB). Installed and registered by `wzrdx setup`. Exposes kb_status, kb_ingest, kb_search, kb_query, kb_ask, kb_digest, kb_enrich_report.

plugins.name: graphify
plugins.notes: Primary knowledge graph (graphifylabs.ai). Installed by `wzrdx setup` via `uv tool install graphifyy`. The raw graphify-mcp is not exposed separately — wzrdx-kb wraps it.

plugins.name: company-profile
plugins.notes: Company base context (name, market, customers, niche, objectives). Ships with the `wzrdx company` command. CKO uses the profile to scope gap analysis and routing.

plugins.name: schedule
plugins.notes: Automates the daily-digest and weekly enrich cadence via cloud agents (schedule skill). Important caveat: the schedule skill runs cloud agents; the local KB (LanceDB/Graphify at ~/.wzrdx/kb/) is not reachable from the cloud. Use the schedule skill only when the KB is cloud-reachable (e.g. remote KB endpoint). Until then, use the lazy trigger (watermark >24h) or a local cron that invokes `wzrdx-kb digest` directly.

plugins.name: gbrain
plugins.notes: Concepts replicated natively: digest (kb_digest + daily-digest skill), dream-cycle enrichment (kb_enrich_report + kb-enrich skill), citations + gap analysis (agent-side synthesis), source-prefix page typing. Not installed to avoid a second store/retrieval stack (Bun + Postgres). Kept as reference architecture (MIT). See: https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain
